item.title: emotet loader
item.description: initial triage. packed loader, drops and persists. full thread below.

item.title: loupe
item.description:
emulation-based malware deobfuscator and unpacker built in Go using Unicorn Engine.

status: active development

stack: Go, Unicorn Engine, PE parsing

github →

item.title: nox
item.description:
intrusion detection system with stateful rules engine, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, structured logging, Prometheus metrics, and gRPC.

status: complete

github →

item.title: canon
item.description:
these are texts, people, and ideas that form the bedrock of how i work and why. not inspiration, more like obligations. the standard im trying to meet.

  • “The street will find its own uses for technology” — Timothy May
  • “I have offended God and mankind because my work did not reach the quality it should have.” - Leonardo DaVinci
  • “We disdained all existing software” - The Evolution of the Unix Time-sharing System.pdf
  • A Cypherpunk’s Manifesto — Eric Hughes, 1993
  • The Crypto Anarchist Manifesto — Timothy May, 1988
  • The Artist Is Absent - Martin Margiela

item.title: now
item.description:
last updated: 2026-04

building

  • loupe: PE parsing, IAT patching, Unicorn Engine emulator scaffolding

studying

  • BlackMatter ransomware — LCG-based encryption, embedded config extraction
  • Windows internals

reading

  • —

listening

  • —
